nasb.text: Who knows, God may turn and relent and withdraw His burning anger so that we will not perish.”

esv.text: Who knows? God may turn and relent and turn from his fierce anger, so that we may not perish.”

cnv.text: 或者　神回心轉意，不發烈怒，使我們不致滅亡。’”

ccb.text: 上帝或许会施怜悯，收回烈怒，使我们不致灭亡，也未可知。”

csbs.text: 或许神会转回、施怜悯，从他猛烈的怒气中转回，使我们不致灭亡。’”
